mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clothing_activity_top (goods_id, sort_order, add_time, update_time) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE clothing_activity_top SET sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, goods_id, sort_order, add_time, update_time FROM clothing_activity_top WHERE goods_id = #{goodsId}
SELECT id, goods_id, sort_order, add_time, update_time FROM clothing_activity_top ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
